hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
if [ -z "$TMUX" ]; then
  echo '[Hook] TIP: Consider tmux for session persistence' >&2
fi
cat

PreToolUse.description: Reminder to use tmux for long-running npm commands

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
if [ "$SKIP_PUSH_DELAY" = "1" ]; then
  cat
  exit 0
fi
echo '[Hook] Revisar cambios antes de push...' >&2
echo '[Hook] Continuando en 5 segundos... (Ctrl+C para abortar, SKIP_PUSH_DELAY=1 para omitir)' >&2
sleep 5
cat

PreToolUse.description: Pausa antes de git push para revisar cambios

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
echo '[Hook] WARNING: Archivo de migración Flyway detectado' >&2
echo '[Hook] - Verificar que sea compatible con datos existentes' >&2
echo '[Hook] - Probar en entorno local antes de producción (docker-compose down -v)' >&2
echo '[Hook] - Revisar impacto en FK constraints' >&2
echo '[Hook] - Actualizar datos/00_gmarm_completo.sql (fuente de verdad)' >&2
cat

PreToolUse.description: Recordatorio de seguridad para migraciones Flyway SQL

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
echo '[Hook] RECORDATORIO: Reiniciar Docker después de cambios Java' >&2
echo '[Hook] docker-compose -f docker-compose.local.yml restart backend_local' >&2
cat

PreToolUse.description: Recordar reiniciar Docker tras cambios en Java

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
output=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_output.output // ""')
pr_url=$(echo "$output" | grep -oE 'https://github.com/[^/]+/[^/]+/pull/[0-9]+')

if [ -n "$pr_url" ]; then
  pr_num=$(echo "$pr_url" | sed -E 's|.*/pull/([0-9]+)|\1|')
  echo "[Hook] PR creado: $pr_url" >&2
  echo "[Hook] Monitorear: gh pr checks $pr_num --watch" >&2
fi

echo "$input"

PostToolUse.description: Log URL del PR y comando de monitoreo

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')

if [ -n "$file_path" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then
  if ! npx prettier --write "$file_path" 2>&1 | grep -v '^$' >&2; then
    echo "[Hook] Prettier formatting applied to $file_path" >&2
  fi
fi

echo "$input"

PostToolUse.description: Auto-format con Prettier para archivos frontend

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')

if [ "$SKIP_TS_CHECK" = "1" ]; then
  echo "$input"
  exit 0
fi

if [ -n "$file_path" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then
  dir=$(dirname "$file_path")
  project_root="$dir"
  while [ "$project_root" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$project_root/package.json" ]; do
    project_root=$(dirname "$project_root")
  done
  
  if [ -f "$project_root/tsconfig.json" ]; then
    cd "$project_root" && timeout 30 npx tsc --noEmit --incremental --pretty false 2>&1 | grep "$file_path" | head -10 >&2 || true
  fi
fi

echo "$input"

PostToolUse.description: TypeScript check después de editar archivos .ts/.tsx

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')

if [ -n "$file_path" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then
  console_usage=$(grep -nE "console\\.(log|warn|error|debug|info)" "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || true)
  
  if [ -n "$console_usage" ]; then
    echo "[Hook] WARNING: console.* encontrado en $file_path" >&2
    echo "$console_usage" | head -5 >&2
    echo "[Hook] Considerar usar logger apropiado en lugar de console.*" >&2
  fi
fi

echo "$input"

PostToolUse.description: Advertencia sobre uso de console.* en frontend

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)

if git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  modified_files=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$' || true)
  
  if [ -n "$modified_files" ]; then
    has_console=false
    while IFS= read -r file; do
      if [ -f "$file" ] && grep -qE "console\.(log|warn|error|debug|info)" "$file" 2>/dev/null; then
        echo "[Hook] WARNING: console.* en $file" >&2
        has_console=true
      fi
    done <<< "$modified_files"
    
    if [ "$has_console" = true ]; then
      echo "[Hook] Verificar console.* antes de commit" >&2
    fi
  fi
fi

echo "$input"

Stop.description: Auditoría final de console.* antes de terminar sesión
